title: Funnel hard fixture
preview: A deliberately hard fixture for the universal-PDF funnel proof: a multi-item list, a table, and a callout in one document so non-1:1 block pairing surfaces.

content.value: This document exists to stress the universal-PDF funnel verifier. It mixes a list, a table, and a callout so block pairing must survive structures that do not collapse to a single block.

items.value: Render the editor canvas of this fixture to PDF.
Render the HTML export of this fixture to PDF.
Extract per-block geometry from both PDFs.
Pair blocks by document order and compare continuous-y.
Assert the list does not collapse to a single block.

content.value: A list with five items, a four-row table, and a callout each segment into multiple PDF blocks. If pairing assumed one block per AST node the rows would cascade out of alignment. This fixture proves they do not.
If the editor and HTML channels segment into a comparable number of blocks and paired blocks sit close in continuous-y, the funnel works end-to-end.
